sql_array: CREATE TABLE geolocation_data (id UInt32, latitude Float64, longitude Float64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO geolocation_data (id, latitude, longitude) VALUES (1, 37.7749, -122.4194);
SELECT id, geohash(latitude, longitude) AS geohash_value FROM geolocation_data WHERE latitude BETWEEN 37.0 AND 38.0;
UPDATE geolocation_data SET latitude = 34.0522, longitude = -118.2437 WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, geohash(latitude, longitude) AS geohash_value FROM geolocation_data HAVING geohash_value LIKE '9q';
